sourceAmbiguity: The source states caller ID is weak bounded evidence but does not provide a numeric cap.
decisionTaken: Capped caller_id_hint contribution at 0.25 and added TEL_VERIFY_189_CALLER_ID_ONLY_BLOCKED when no non-caller-ID features are positive.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Caller ID may narrow candidates but can never by itself prove identity or destination safety.
operationalRisk: Legitimate callers from known phones still need DOB, surname, postcode, callback, handset proof, or IVR consistency.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Adjust maximumCallerIdContribution only in a new threshold profile after abuse review.
